title: Live Train Status Dashboard
description: Real-time Solari-style departure board for the Naihati–Sealdah route. Scrapes RailYatri via CORS proxy and renders a flip-display animation in React.

title: Follower Garden
description: Every Instagram follower becomes a flower in a Ghibli-aesthetic garden. Real-time follow/unfollow animations powered by a FastAPI + instaloader backend on a Raspberry Pi.

title: AETHER — RF Visualizer
description: Ambient art object that reads Wi-Fi & Bluetooth RF signal strength via an AD8318 detector and breathes light through a WS2812B LED ring. FreeRTOS dual-core firmware.

title: Modular Home Sensor Node
description: Battery-powered ESP32-C3 sensor node (XIAO form factor) with TCA9548A I2C multiplexer for simultaneous multi-sensor readings. 6-month battery target via aggressive deep sleep.

title: 3D-Printed Desk Pet
description: Round ESP32-S3 display renders animated bird faces with typographic clock eyes. OTA firmware updates via GitHub Actions. Fully 3D printable enclosure.
